message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Nurse

participant ": RecordAdverseReactionUI" as UI
participant ": RecordAdverseReactionController" as C
participant ": Company" as Company
participant ": AdverseReactionStore" as ARS
participant ": AdverseReactionDTO" as DTO
participant ": AdverseReactionMapper" as Mapper
participant ": WaitingRoomStore" as WRS
participant ": AdverseReaction" as AR

Nurse -> UI : 1 Starts recording adverse reaction
UI --> Nurse : 2 asks for data(SNS Number, Adverse Reaction Text)
Nurse -> UI : 3 types requested data

UI -> C : 4 createAdverseReaction(SNSNumber, advReact)
activate C

C -> Company : 5 store = getWaitingRoomStore()
C -> Company : 6 store = getRecordAdverseReactionStore()
C -> WRS : 7 snsu = getSNSUserInTheWaitingRoomBySNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
C -> WRS : 8 vc = getVaccinationCenterBySNSNumber(snsuserNumber)
C -> Company : 9 ar = createAdverseReaction(snsu, advReact,'vc)
activate Company
Company -> AR : 10 create(snsu,advReact,vc)
Company -> Company : 11 validateAdverseReaction(ar)
deactivate Company

C -> Mapper : 12 toDTO(ar)
activate Mapper
ref over Mapper
  SD_AdverseReactionMapper_toDTO
end ref
Mapper --> C : 13 arDTO
deactivate Mapper

C --> UI : 14 arDTO
deactivate C

UI --> Nurse : 15 shows SNS User correspondent to the SNS Number\nand adverse reaction waiting for approval
Nurse -> UI : 16 confirms action

UI -> C : 17 saveAdverseReaction()
activate C
C -> ARS : 18 saveAdverseReaction(ar)
activate ARS
ARS -> ARS : 19 validateAdverseReaction(ar)
ARS -> ARS : 20 addAdverseReaction(ar)
deactivate ARS
deactivate C

UI --> Nurse : 21 informs oppertiton success
@enduml
